name: Ibrahim (Mark) Maged Mohamed Al-Asfar
title: Senior Systems Architect & Full-Stack Developer
summary: Systems Architect with a proven track record of building mission-critical, high-availability platforms from the ground up. Founder of MGzon, a comprehensive 6M-line ERP ecosystem with fintech, real-time chat (WebSockets), and multi-vendor e-commerce capabilities.

projects.name: MGzon - Enterprise ERP Platform
projects.description: 6M-line ERP serving 10k+ users across 5 countries. Built MGpay (PCI-DSS compliant digital wallet), real-time chat, LLM features (RAG), custom monitoring saving 20+ hours/week.

projects.name: Next.js & Vercel Core Architecture Contribution
projects.description: Diagnosed critical bug (searchParams empty on static pages + Draft Mode on Vercel). Submitted fix in Next.js (#93063) and @vercel/next v4.16.9 (+54/-22 lines). Official release.

projects.name: Naseej - Multi-Vendor E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Built complete platform (25,810 lines) in 5 days with real-time chat, GraphQL API, payment processing, 3-server Docker architecture.

experience.title: Founder & Lead Systems Architect
achievements: Architected and developed the entire MGzon platform from inception to 10,000+ active users.
Scaled backend infrastructure to reliably process 100,000+ daily batch transactions.
Achieved 85% reduction in production incidents by implementing custom observability.
Established best practices for clean architecture and security-first development.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
achievements: Delivered 15+ custom web applications for clients across the MENA region.
Built bespoke e-commerce platforms and integrated complex third-party APIs.
